abbreviations.definition: repeat the sequence of loops in brackets L times

materials: YarnArt JEANS (55% cotton, 45% Polyacrylic) Color No.:29
YarnArt Dolce Baby (100% Micro Polyester) Color No.: 80361

rounds.rawInstruction: Start 10 sc in a magic ring
rounds.summary: Create a magic ring and work 10 single crochets into it.
rounds.title: Row 1

rounds.summary: Work 10 single crochets in each row for three rows.
rounds.title: Rows 2-4

rounds.summary: Increase four times and work six single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 5

rounds.summary: Repeat one single crochet and one increase seven times.
rounds.title: Row 6

rounds.summary: Work 21 single crochets in each row for five rows.
rounds.title: Rows 7-11

rounds.summary: Decrease twice and work ten single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 12

rounds.summary: Work 12 single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 13

rounds.rawInstruction: Stuff (it will only be in my head)
rounds.summary: Add stuffing to the head portion only.
rounds.title: Stuff (it will only be in my head)

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work ten single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 13 (continued)

rounds.summary: Work 11 single crochets in each row for seventy rows.
rounds.title: Rows 14-83

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work nine single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 84

rounds.summary: Work 10 single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 85

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work eight single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 86

rounds.summary: Work 9 single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 87

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work seven single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 88

rounds.rawInstruction: Next, insert the wire into the body, pre-bend the edges of the wire
rounds.summary: Insert and shape the wire inside the body.
rounds.title: Next, insert the wire into the body, pre-bend the edges of the wire

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work six single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 89

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work five single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 90

rounds.summary: Work 6 single crochets in each row for two rows.
rounds.title: Rows 91-92

rounds.summary: Fasten off and close the remaining six stitches.
rounds.title: Close 6 loops.

rounds.rawInstruction: We glue the eyes and embroider the eyebrows.
rounds.summary: Attach eyes with glue and embroider eyebrows.
rounds.title: We glue the eyes and embroider the eyebrows.

rounds.rawInstruction: Start 10 sc in a magic ring
rounds.summary: Create a magic ring and work 10 single crochets into it.
rounds.title: Row 1

rounds.summary: Increase six times.
rounds.title: Row 2

rounds.summary: Work 12 single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 3

rounds.summary: Repeat five single crochets and one increase twice.
rounds.title: Row 4

rounds.summary: Work 14 single crochets in each row for two rows.
rounds.title: Rows 5-6

rounds.rawInstruction: inc, 5 sc, 3 inc, 3 sc, 2 inc = 20 sc
rounds.summary: Increase, work 5 sc, increase 3 times, work 3 sc, increase twice.
rounds.title: Row 7

rounds.summary: Increase 3 times, work 5 sc, increase 3 times, work 9 sc.
rounds.title: Row 8

rounds.summary: Work 26 single crochets in each row for seven rows.
rounds.title: Rows 9-15

rounds.summary: Decrease twice, work 10 sc, decrease twice, work 8 sc.
rounds.title: Row 16

rounds.summary: Add stuffing to the body.
rounds.title: Stuff

rounds.rawInstruction: (4 sc, dec) х 3 times, 4 sc = 19 sc
rounds.summary: Repeat four single crochets and one decrease three times, then work 4 sc.
rounds.title: Row 17

rounds.rawInstruction: (2 sc, dec) х 4 times, 3 sc = 15 sc
rounds.summary: Repeat two single crochets and one decrease four times, then work 3 sc.
rounds.title: Row 18

rounds.summary: Add more stuffing.
rounds.title: Stuff

rounds.summary: Work 15 single crochets for 74 rows while gradually stuffing.
rounds.title: Rows 19-92

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work 13 single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 93

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work 12 single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 94

rounds.summary: Work 13 single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 95

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work 11 single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 96

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work 10 single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 97

rounds.summary: Work 11 single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 98

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work 9 single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 99

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work 8 single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 100

rounds.summary: Repeat one single crochet and one decrease three times.
rounds.title: Row 101

rounds.summary: Work 6 single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 102

rounds.summary: Fasten off and close the remaining six stitches.
rounds.title: Close 6 loops.

rounds.rawInstruction: Gluing the eyes: I smeared the tips of the eyes with glue and inserted them in 10 rows from the beginning of the head, the distance between the eyes is 10 loops. We embroider eyebrows over the eyes:
rounds.summary: Attach eyes with glue and embroider eyebrows.
rounds.title: Gluing the eyes: I smeared the tips of the eyes with glue and inserted them in 10 rows from the beginning of the head, the distance between the eyes is 10 loops. We embroider eyebrows over the eyes:
